name: Universal Vision
description:
Universal Vision: Soul Evolution and the Cosmic Plan — Scott Mandelker, Ph.D. UV Way (San Francisco). ISBN 0-9701985-0-7.

Spirituality / UFO-ET metaphysics. Mandelker (MA in Counseling, Ph.D. in East-West Psychology) integrates UFO/ET themes with self-healing and spiritual growth — “Schoolhouse Earth,” soul evolution, service to others. A follow-up to From Elsewhere: Being ET in America; blurbed by Brad Steiger, Kenneth Ring, and Dolores Cannon.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- Catnip for the conscious / ET / metaphysics crowd; a cult niche with devoted readers.
- A local hook: Mandelker has given seminars in Japan.
- Good condition.
